<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Charumathi P — Software Developer Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&family=Jost:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --bg:#faf9f7;--bg2:#f2f0ec;--bg3:#e8e4de;
  --navy:#0d1b2a;--navy2:#1a2d45;--navy3:#243b55;
  --gold:#b8860b;--gold2:#d4a017;--gold-light:#f0c040;
  --teal:#0a7e6e;--teal2:#0d9e8a;
  --text:#1a1a1a;--muted:#6b6260;--light:#9e9895;
  --white:#ffffff;
  --serif:"Cormorant Garamond",Georgia,serif;
  --sans:"Jost",sans-serif;
  --shadow:0 2px 24px rgba(13,27,42,0.08);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:var(--sans);background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);line-height:1.6;overflow-x:hidden}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--navy)}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--gold2);border-radius:4px}

/* LOADER */
#loader{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--navy);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:9999;transition:opacity .5s .4s}
#loader.gone{opacity:0;pointer-events:none}
.loader-text{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:2.5rem;color:var(--gold2);letter-spacing:0.15em;animation:shimmer 1.5s infinite}
@keyframes shimmer{0%,100%{opacity:.4}50%{opacity:1}}

/* NAV */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;height:68px;padding:0 6%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:rgba(250,249,247,0.96);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(184,134,11,0.12);transition:box-shadow .3s}
nav.scrolled{box-shadow:0 2px 24px rgba(13,27,42,0.08)}
.nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.75rem;text-decoration:none}
.nav-logo-mark{width:36px;height:36px;background:var(--navy);border-radius:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--gold2);font-weight:700}
.nav-logo-text{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--navy);font-weight:600}
.nav-menu{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;list-style:none;align-items:center}
.nav-menu a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color .2s;position:relative}
.nav-menu a::after{content:"";position:absolute;bottom:-4px;left:0;right:0;height:1.5px;background:var(--gold2);transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .25s}
.nav-menu a:hover{color:var(--navy)}
.nav-menu a:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}
.nav-cta{background:var(--navy)!important;color:var(--gold2)!important;padding:0.5rem 1.25rem!important;border-radius:3px!important}
.nav-cta::after{display:none!important}
.nav-cta:hover{background:var(--navy2)!important;color:var(--gold-light)!important}

/* HERO */
.hero{min-height:100vh;background:var(--navy);display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 420px;align-items:center;padding:8rem 6% 4rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;gap:4rem}
.hero::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:-200px;right:-100px;width:700px;height:700px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(184,134,11,0.12) 0%,transparent 65%);pointer-events:none}
.hero::after{content:"";position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent 0%,var(--gold2) 40%,var(--teal2) 70%,transparent 100%)}
.hero-dots{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;background-image:radial-gradient(rgba(184,134,11,0.15) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:32px 32px;pointer-events:none;opacity:.4}
.hero-content{position:relative;z-index:1}
.hero-eyebrow{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold2);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:2rem}
.hero-eyebrow::before{content:"";width:32px;height:1px;background:var(--gold2)}
.hero h1{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(3rem,5.5vw,5.5rem);color:var(--white);font-weight:600;line-height:1.0;margin-bottom:1rem}
.hero h1 span{color:var(--gold2)}
.hero h1 em{font-style:italic;font-weight:300;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6)}
.hero-tagline{font-family:var(--serif);font-style:italic;font-size:1.1rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin-bottom:1.5rem;font-weight:300}
.hero-desc{font-size:.92rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);max-width:500px;line-height:1.9;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:2.5rem}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:3rem}
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;padding:.8rem 2rem;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:500;font-family:var(--sans);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;border-radius:3px;transition:all .25s;cursor:pointer;border:none}
.btn-gold{background:var(--gold2);color:var(--navy)}
.btn-gold:hover{background:var(--gold-light);transform:translateY(-1px)}
.btn-outline-light{background:transparent;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2)}
.btn-outline-light:hover{border-color:var(--gold2);color:var(--gold2)}
.hero-pills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.6rem}
.hero-pill{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);font-size:.72rem;padding:.3rem .8rem;border-radius:2rem;font-weight:300}

/* PROFILE CARD */
.hero-aside{position:relative;z-index:1}
.profile-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(184,134,11,.2);border-radius:16px;padding:2.5rem 2rem;backdrop-filter:blur(8px)}
.profile-photo-wrap{position:relative;width:120px;height:120px;margin:0 auto 1.5rem}
.profile-photo{width:120px;height:120px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top center;border:3px solid var(--gold2);box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(184,134,11,.12),0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.4);display:block}
.profile-status{position:absolute;bottom:4px;right:4px;width:16px;height:16px;border-radius:50%;background:#22c55e;border:2.5px solid var(--navy);box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(34,197,94,.6)}
.profile-name{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.4rem;color:var(--white);font-weight:600;text-align:center;margin-bottom:.2rem}
.profile-title{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold2);text-align:center;margin-bottom:1.8rem}
.profile-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.stat{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);padding:1rem;text-align:center}
.stat-val{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.8rem;color:var(--gold2);font-weight:600;line-height:1}
.stat-label{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);margin-top:.25rem}
.profile-contact{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.6rem}
.profile-contact a{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);text-decoration:none;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:300;transition:color .2s;padding:.25rem 0}
.profile-contact a:hover{color:var(--gold2)}
.ci{font-size:.9rem;width:20px;text-align:center}

/* SECTION */
section{padding:6rem 6%}
.section-inner{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto}
.sec-head{margin-bottom:4rem}
.sec-kicker{font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.3em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.6rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.75rem}
.sec-kicker::before{content:"";width:24px;height:1px;background:var(--gold)}
.sec-title{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(2rem,3.5vw,3rem);color:var(--navy);font-weight:600;line-height:1.15}
.sec-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--teal)}
.sec-title-light{color:var(--white)}
.sec-title-light em{color:var(--gold2)}

/* ABOUT */
#about{background:var(--white)}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 340px;gap:5rem;align-items:start}
.about-photo-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.2rem}
.about-photo-frame{border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--bg3);box-shadow:var(--shadow);aspect-ratio:4/5}
.about-photo-frame img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top center;display:block}
.about-text p{font-size:.95rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.95;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:1.3rem}
.about-text p strong{color:var(--navy);font-weight:500}
.about-badges{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.6rem;margin-top:1rem}
.badge{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--bg3);color:var(--navy);font-size:.75rem;padding:.35rem .85rem;border-radius:3px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.04em}
.sidebar-card{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--bg3);border-radius:10px;padding:1.5rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.sidebar-card-title{font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:1rem}
.sidebar-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:.5rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bg2);font-size:.83rem}
.sidebar-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.sidebar-row span:first-child{color:var(--muted);font-weight:300}
.sidebar-row span:last-child{color:var(--navy);font-weight:500}

/* SKILLS */
#skills{background:var(--bg2)}
.skills-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2rem}
.skill-group{background:var(--white);border-radius:10px;padding:1.75rem;border:1px solid var(--bg3)}
.skill-group-name{font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:1rem;padding-bottom:.75rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bg2)}
.skill-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem}
.chip{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--bg3);color:var(--text);font-size:.78rem;padding:.35rem .75rem;border-radius:3px;transition:all .2s}
.chip:hover{background:var(--navy);color:var(--gold2);border-color:var(--navy)}

/* PROJECTS */
#projects{background:var(--navy)}
.projects-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.project-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:12px;padding:2.25rem;transition:all .3s;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.project-card::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold2),var(--teal2));transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .35s;transform-origin:left}
.project-card:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border-color:rgba(184,134,11,.25);transform:translateY(-4px)}
.project-card:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
.proj-tag{display:inline-block;font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold2);border:1px solid rgba(184,134,11,.3);padding:.22rem .65rem;border-radius:2rem;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.proj-title{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.3rem;color:var(--white);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.6rem}
.proj-desc{font-size:.85rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);line-height:1.8;font-weight:300}
.proj-tech{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-top:1.2rem}
.proj-tech span{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--teal2);background:rgba(10,126,110,.1);border:1px solid rgba(10,126,110,.2);padding:.2rem .55rem;border-radius:2rem}

/* EXPERIENCE */
#experience{background:var(--white)}
.exp-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.exp-item{display:grid;grid-template-columns:200px 1fr;gap:3rem;padding:2.5rem 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--bg2);position:relative}
.exp-item::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:195px;top:0;bottom:0;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--bg2),var(--gold2) 30%,var(--teal2) 70%,var(--bg2));opacity:.4}
.exp-dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold2);position:absolute;left:191px;top:2.7rem;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(184,134,11,.15)}
.exp-period{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.4rem}
.exp-company{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:300}
.exp-type{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.4rem}
.exp-role{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.3rem;color:var(--navy);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.exp-desc{font-size:.87rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.85;font-weight:300}
.exp-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;margin-top:1rem}
.exp-tag{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--navy);background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--bg3);padding:.2rem .6rem;border-radius:2rem}

/* EDUCATION */
#education{background:var(--bg2)}
.edu-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.edu-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--bg3);border-radius:12px;padding:2rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .25s,transform .25s}
.edu-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold2);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.edu-accent{position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--gold2),var(--teal2))}
.edu-period{font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.5rem}
.edu-degree{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--navy);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.3rem;line-height:1.3}
.edu-inst{font-size:.83rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;margin-bottom:.8rem}
.edu-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;background:rgba(184,134,11,.08);border:1px solid rgba(184,134,11,.2);color:var(--gold);font-size:.73rem;font-weight:600;padding:.25rem .7rem;border-radius:2rem}

/* CERTIFICATIONS */
#certs{background:var(--navy)}
.certs-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:1rem}
.cert-card{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:1rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.07);border-radius:8px;padding:1.25rem;transition:border-color .2s,background .2s}
.cert-card:hover{border-color:rgba(184,134,11,.3);background:rgba(255,255,255,.05)}
.cert-num{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.2rem;color:rgba(184,134,11,.35);font-weight:600;min-width:28px;line-height:1;padding-top:2px}
.cert-provider{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal2);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:.2rem}
.cert-name{font-size:.85rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);font-weight:300;line-height:1.5}

/* ACHIEVEMENTS */
#achievements{background:var(--white)}
.ach-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.2rem}
.ach-card{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--bg3);border-radius:10px;padding:1.5rem;transition:all .25s}
.ach-card:hover{background:var(--navy);border-color:var(--navy)}
.ach-card:hover .ach-title{color:var(--white)}
.ach-card:hover .ach-year{color:var(--gold2)}
.ach-glyph{font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.ach-title{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--navy);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:.3rem;line-height:1.4;transition:color .25s}
.ach-year{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--light);transition:color .25s}

/* PLACEMENT */
#placement{background:var(--bg2)}
.placement-intro{font-size:.95rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;line-height:1.8;max-width:600px;margin-bottom:2.5rem}
.placement-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:1.2rem}
.company-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--bg3);border-radius:10px;padding:1.5rem 1.25rem;text-align:center;transition:all .25s}
.company-card:hover{border-color:var(--gold2);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.company-initial{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--navy);color:var(--gold2);font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto .75rem}
.company-name{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--navy);font-weight:500;line-height:1.4}

/* CONTACT */
#contact{background:var(--navy);text-align:center}
.contact-headline{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(2.5rem,5vw,4rem);color:var(--white);font-weight:600;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:1rem}
.contact-headline em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold2)}
.contact-sub{font-size:.92rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);max-width:480px;margin:0 auto 3rem;line-height:1.8;font-weight:300}
.contact-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:1rem;max-width:900px;margin:0 auto}
.contact-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:10px;padding:1.5rem 1rem;text-decoration:none;transition:all .25s}
.contact-card:hover{background:rgba(184,134,11,.08);border-color:rgba(184,134,11,.3);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.contact-card-icon{font-size:1.4rem}
.contact-card-label{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.35);font-weight:500}
.contact-card-val{font-size:.82rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);font-weight:300;word-break:break-all;text-align:center}

/* FOOTER */
footer{background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);padding:2rem 6%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem}
.footer-left{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:1rem;color:var(--gold2)}
.footer-right{font-size:.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.25);letter-spacing:.08em}

/* REVEAL */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px);transition:opacity .75s ease,transform .75s ease}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:none}
.reveal-delay-1{transition-delay:.1s}
.reveal-delay-2{transition-delay:.2s}
.reveal-delay-3{transition-delay:.3s}

@media(max-width:900px){
  .hero{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .hero-aside{display:none}
  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .about-photo-col{display:none}
  .skills-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .projects-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .exp-item{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:.5rem}
  .exp-item::before,.exp-dot{display:none}
  .edu-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .certs-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .ach-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .placement-row{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .nav-menu{display:none}
}
@media(max-width:600px){
  .skills-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .ach-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .placement-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  section{padding:4rem 5%}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="loader"><div class="loader-text">CP</div></div>

<nav id="mainNav">
  <a href="#home" class="nav-logo">
    <div class="nav-logo-mark">CP</div>
    <span class="nav-logo-text">Charumathi P</span>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-menu">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#skills">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#education">Education</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Hire Me</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<section class="hero" id="home">
  <div class="hero-dots"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow">Experienced Fresher · Open to Opportunities</div>
    <h1>Charumathi <span>P</span><br><em>Software Developer</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">Building real-world solutions with clean code &amp; creative thinking</p>
    <p class="hero-desc">Aspiring Software Developer focused on scalable web applications and emerging tech. Equipped with hands-on internship experience, a strong academic record, and a passion for continuous learning.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#projects" class="btn btn-gold">View My Work</a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn btn-outline-light">Get In Touch</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-pills">
      <span class="hero-pill">Python</span>
      <span class="hero-pill">Java</span>
      <span class="hero-pill">HTML &amp; CSS</span>
      <span class="hero-pill">MySQL</span>
      <span class="hero-pill">MongoDB</span>
      <span class="hero-pill">Git</span>
      <span class="hero-pill">Arduino</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-aside">
    <div class="profile-card">
      <div class="profile-photo-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Charumathi P" class="profile-photo"/>
        <div class="profile-status"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="profile-name">Charumathi P</div>
      <div class="profile-title">Software Developer · B.E. CSE</div>
      <div class="profile-stats">
        <div class="stat"><div class="stat-val">8.61</div><div class="stat-label">CGPA</div></div>
        <div class="stat"><div class="stat-val">86%</div><div class="stat-label">Diploma</div></div>
        <div class="stat"><div class="stat-val">5+</div><div class="stat-label">Internships</div></div>
        <div class="stat"><div class="stat-val">10+</div><div class="stat-label">Certifications</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="profile-contact">
        <a href="tel:+918056444207"><span class="ci">📞</span>+91 8056444207</a>
        <a href="mailto:charuprabahar2002@gmail.com"><span class="ci">✉️</span>charuprabahar2002@gmail.com</a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/charumathi-p-11504225b" target="_blank"><span class="ci">💼</span>LinkedIn Profile</a>
        <a href="https://leetcode.com/u/22_charu/" target="_blank"><span class="ci">🧩</span>LeetCode: 22_charu</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="about">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <p class="sec-kicker">Who I Am</p>
      <h2 class="sec-title">A driven student &amp; <em>developer</em><br>ready to make an impact</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="about-text reveal">
        <p>I am <strong>Charumathi P</strong>, an Experienced Fresher and aspiring Software Developer currently pursuing <strong>B.E. Computer Science and Engineering</strong> at Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan Engineering College (CGPA: 8.61). My academic journey began with a Diploma in CSE where I scored an outstanding <strong>86%</strong>.</p>
        <p>My strength lies at the intersection of <strong>hardware and software</strong> — I have built Arduino-based wearables, IoT systems, crime prediction web apps, and worked as a web development intern at multiple companies. I bring both academic rigour and real-world experience to every project.</p>
        <p>I am a <strong>problem solver at heart</strong> — with 160+ DSA problems solved on GeeksforGeeks, Top Interview 150 on LeetCode, and participation in Smart India Hackathon 2025. I thrive in collaborative environments and am always pushing myself to learn more.</p>
        <div class="about-badges">
          <span class="badge">Problem Solver</span>
          <span class="badge">Agile Learner</span>
          <span class="badge">Team Player</span>
          <span class="badge">IoT Enthusiast</span>
          <span class="badge">Web Developer</span>
          <span class="badge">Open to Relocation</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="about-photo-col reveal reveal-delay-2">
        <div class="about-photo-frame">
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Charumathi P"/>
        </div>
        <div class="sidebar-card">
          <div class="sidebar-card-title">Quick Facts</div>
          <div class="sidebar-row"><span>Location</span><span>Tamil Nadu, India</span></div>
          <div class="sidebar-row"><span>Degree</span><span>B.E. CSE (2024–27)</span></div>
          <div class="sidebar-row"><span>CGPA</span><span>8.61</span></div>
          <div class="sidebar-row"><span>Status</span><span>Available</span></div>
          <div class="sidebar-row"><span>Languages</span><span>EN · TA · HI</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="sidebar-card">
          <div class="sidebar-card-title">Coding Profiles</div>
          <div class="sidebar-row"><span>LeetCode</span><span>Top 150</span></div>
          <div class="sidebar-row"><span>GeeksforGeeks</span><span>160+ DSA</span></div>
          <div class="sidebar-row"><span>HackerRank</span><span>Problem Solving</span></div>
          <div class="sidebar-row"><span>GitHub</span><span>Active</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="skills">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <p class="sec-kicker">Technical Expertise</p>
      <h2 class="sec-title">Skills &amp; <em>Competencies</em></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="skills-layout">
      <div class="skill-group reveal"><div class="skill-group-name">Languages</div><div class="skill-chips"><span class="chip">C</span><span class="chip">Java</span><span class="chip">Python</span></div></div>
      <div class="skill-group reveal reveal-delay-1"><div class="skill-group-name">Web Development</div><div class="skill-chips"><span class="chip">HTML5</span><span class="chip">CSS3</span></div></div>
      <div class="skill-group reveal reveal-delay-2"><div class="skill-group-name">Databases</div><div class="skill-chips"><span class="chip">MySQL</span><span class="chip">MongoDB</span></div></div>
      <div class="skill-group reveal"><div class="skill-group-name">Dev Tools</div><div class="skill-chips"><span class="chip">GitHub</span><span class="chip">VS Code</span><span class="chip">Jupyter</span><span class="chip">Colab</span></div></div>
      <div class="skill-group reveal reveal-delay-1"><div class="skill-group-name">Design &amp; Productivity</div><div class="skill-chips"><span class="chip">Canva</span><span class="chip">Figma</span><span class="chip">MS Office</span><span class="chip">ServiceNow</span></div></div>
      <div class="skill-group reveal reveal-delay-2"><div class="skill-group-name">Core</div><div class="skill-chips"><span class="chip">DSA</span><span class="chip">Problem Solving</span><span class="chip">Agile</span><span class="chip">Linux</span><span class="chip">Windows</span></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="projects">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <p class="sec-kicker" style="color:var(--gold2)">Portfolio</p>
      <h2 class="sec-title sec-title-light">Featured <em>Projects</em></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="projects-grid">
      <div class="project-card reveal">
        <span class="proj-tag">Hardware · Electronics</span>
        <div class="proj-title">Clap Switch Circuit</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">Sound-activated LED control system built entirely using analog components — no microcontroller needed. Demonstrates deep understanding of signal processing and circuit design at the component level.</div>
        <div class="proj-tech"><span>Analog Circuits</span><span>Signal Processing</span><span>Electronics</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <span class="proj-tag">Web App · Data Science</span>
        <div class="proj-title">Crime Rate Prediction App</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">Full-featured web application for crime data visualization using interactive maps and advanced filtering. Enables users to identify geographic and temporal crime patterns.</div>
        <div class="proj-tech"><span>Python</span><span>Data Visualization</span><span>Maps API</span><span>Web Dev</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-card reveal">
        <span class="proj-tag">IoT · Assistive Tech</span>
        <div class="proj-title">Third Eye Glass for Blind</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">Arduino-based wearable using ultrasonic sensors to detect obstacles, enabling safer and more independent navigation for visually impaired individuals.</div>
        <div class="proj-tech"><span>Arduino</span><span>Ultrasonic Sensors</span><span>C++</span><span>IoT</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="project-card reveal reveal-delay-1">
        <span class="proj-tag">IoT · Smart Home</span>
        <div class="proj-title">Home Automation System</div>
        <div class="proj-desc">IoT-based smart home appliance control using Arduino and Bluetooth module (HC-05). Enables wireless remote control of appliances directly from a mobile device.</div>
        <div class="proj-tech"><span>Arduino</span><span>Bluetooth HC-05</span><span>IoT</span><span>Mobile Control</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="experience">
  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <p class="sec-kicker">Work History</p>
      <h2 class="sec-title">Internships &amp; <em>Experience</em></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="exp-list">
      <div class="exp-item reveal">
        <div><div class="exp-period">May – June 2023</div><div class="exp-company">Deyo Infotech</div></div>
        <div class="exp-dot"></div>
        <div><div class="exp-type">Web Development Internship</div><div class="exp-role">Web Development Intern</div><div class="exp-desc">Built responsive, cross-browser compatible web pages. Used Git for version control and collaborated with the development team following professional workflows.</div><div class="exp-tags"><span class="exp-tag">HTML</span><span class="exp-tag">CSS</span><span class="exp-tag">Git</span><span class="exp-tag">Responsive Design</span></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-item reveal">
        <div><div class="exp-period">June – July 2025</div><div class="exp-company">Softspark Pvt. Ltd.</div></div>
        <div class="exp-dot"></div>
        <div><div class="exp-type">Web Development Internship</div><div class="exp-role">Web Developer Intern</div><div class="exp-desc">Improved UI components, optimized performance, and participated in agile development and code reviews.</div><div class="exp-tags"><span class="exp-tag">UI Improvement</span><span class="exp-tag">Performance</span><span class="exp-tag">Code Review</span><span class="exp-tag">Agile</span></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="exp-item reveal">
        <div><div class="exp-period">Online</div><div class="exp-company">CodeTech · SkillCraft · InternPe</div></div>
        <div class="exp-dot"></div>
        <div><div class="exp-type">Online Internships · Multiple Platforms</div><div class="exp-role">Software Development Intern</div><div class="exp-desc">Built mini projects: Calculator, To-Do App, E-commerce demo, and Tic-Tac-Toe — demonstrating versatility in frontend and logic-building.</div><div class="exp-tags"><span class="exp-tag">JavaScript</span><span class="exp-tag">HTML/CSS</span><span class="exp-tag">Frontend</span></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

  <div class="section-inner">

      <h2 class="sec-title">Education &amp; <em>Qualifications</em></h2>

Computer Science and Engineering</div><div class="edu-inst">Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan Engineering College</div><span class="edu-badge">⭐ CGPA: 8.61</span></div>
      <div class="edu-card reveal reveal-delay-1"><div class="edu-accent"></div><div class="edu-period">2021 – 2024</div><div class="edu-degree">Diploma in Computer Science Engineering</div><div class="edu-inst">Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan Polytechnic College</div><span class="edu-badge">⭐ 86%</span></div>

</section>

  <div class="section-inner">
    <div class="sec-head reveal">
      <p class="sec-kicker" style="color:var(--gold2)">Learning &amp; Upskilling</p>

      <div class="cert-card reveal"><div class="cert-num">09</div><div><div class="cert-provider">be10x</div><div class="cert-name">AI Tools &amp; ChatGPT Workshop</div></div></div>

</section>

</section>

<section id="contact">
  <div class="section-inner" style="padding:0">
    <div class="reveal">
      <p class="sec-kicker" style="color:var(--gold2);justify-content:center;margin-bottom:1.5rem">Let's Connect</p>
      <h2 class="contact-headline">Ready to build<br><em>something great?</em></h2>
      <p class="contact-sub">I am actively looking for internships, full-time roles, and project collaborations. Let's talk about how I can contribute to your team.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-cards reveal">
      <a href="tel:+918056444207" class="contact-card"><div class="contact-card-icon">📞</div><div class="contact-card-label">Phone</div><div class="contact-card-val">+91 8056444207</div></a>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-left">Charumathi P</div>
  <div class="footer-right">© 2025 · Aspiring Software Developer · Tamil Nadu, India</div>
</footer>

<script>
window.addEventListener("load",()=>{setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById("loader").classList.add("gone"),600)});
const nav=document.getElementById("mainNav");
window.addEventListener("scroll",()=>{nav.classList.toggle("scrolled",window.scrollY>60)});
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting)e.target.classList.add("visible")})},{threshold:.1});
document.querySelectorAll(".reveal").forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
